name: miamo
description: Miamo — Where connections become something real. Premium dating + social + creativity platform.

scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:users" "npm run dev:social" "npm run dev:messaging" "npm run dev:content" "npm run dev:notifications" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:services: for svc in gateway auth users social messaging content notifications; do echo "Building $svc..." && cd services/$svc && npm run build && cd ../..; done
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.install:services: npm install && for svc in gateway auth users social messaging content notifications; do echo "Installing $svc..." && cd services/$svc && npm install && cd ../..; done && cd web && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: cd api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd api && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build
